title: Data Engineer
description: RetailPulse is a retail analytics company processing 500M+ data events per day from 800 retail clients. You'll build and maintain data pipelines that power real-time dashboards and ML features for our merchandising intelligence product.
responsibilities: Design and build batch and streaming data pipelines processing 500M events/day
Maintain data warehouse models in dbt for analytics and ML feature store
Ensure data quality with automated monitoring and alerting
Collaborate with data scientists on feature engineering
